title: Frame-Rate Independent Movement
description: Move a GameObject with keyboard input, scaled by Time.deltaTime for consistent speed at any frame rate.

title: Rigidbody Movement + Jump
description: Physics-based movement using Rigidbody forces. Forces in FixedUpdate, input detection in Update.

title: Collect Items with Trigger
description: Detect item pickup using a trigger collider. Checks tag to filter what can be picked up.

title: Score Counter with UI
description: Track score with a static-style manager and update a TextMeshPro UI element.

title: Coroutine: Delayed Action
description: Use a coroutine to wait a specified number of seconds, then execute logic (e.g., delayed spawn or respawn).

title: Camera Follow (Smooth)
description: Smooth camera follow using Vector3.Lerp in LateUpdate, with a configurable offset.

title: Raycast — Click to Interact
description: Cast a ray from the camera through the mouse cursor and interact with hit objects.

title: Health System
description: Reusable health component with Take Damage, Heal, and an OnDeath event.

title: Scene Loading
description: Load a new scene synchronously or asynchronously. Includes the required using directive.

title: Play Audio from Script
description: Different ways to play audio in Unity: Play, PlayOneShot, and PlayClipAtPoint.

title: Animator Control from Script
description: Set Animator parameters (Bool, Float, Trigger) to drive transitions and Blend Trees.

title: Singleton Pattern
description: A thread-safe MonoBehaviour Singleton. Use for managers (GameManager, AudioManager) that need global access.

title: 2D Character Controller
description: 2D platformer movement with jump and ground check using Rigidbody2D and Physics2D.Raycast.

title: UI Button via Script
description: Connect a Button's OnClick event in code, and toggle a panel's visibility.

title: Timer Countdown
description: A countdown timer that fires an event when it reaches zero. Updates a TMP text label each second.

title: Save and Load with PlayerPrefs
description: Save and load simple game data (settings, high scores) that persists between game sessions.

title: Spawn Objects on a Timer
description: Coroutine-based spawner that creates instances of a prefab at regular intervals at random positions.

title: LookAt Enemy AI
description: Simple AI that follows and faces the player within a detection range using Vector3 distance.

title: Object Pool (Basic)
description: Reuse GameObjects instead of Instantiate/Destroy every frame — great for bullets, particles, enemies.

title: Health Bar UI Slider
description: Connect a Slider UI element to a Health component to display a health bar that updates in real time.
